decision.description: v0 owned-core pretrain (NC2-own, c03-qat frozen config) -> fp-22 verify-floor world -> accumulation rounds; eval distribution == train distribution by construction
decision.why_not_re_attempt_transfer: fp-25 receipted that re-running transfer at the 98-episode budget in the same world is DEAD; (b)'s world is in-dist by design so the ceiling does not bind it
decision.kill_rule: if the v0 owned core cannot clear a K1-equivalent verify floor in the fp-22 world even with curriculum synthesis (the NC2-own rung-level kill), DEMOTE to fallback (a)

fallback_a.world: MBPP+HumanEval union (164 untouched tasks, same harness)
fallback_a.pre_freeze_obligation: a frontier-depth coverage receipt (fp25b-cov shape) gated BEFORE any (a) prereg freeze

decision.frontier_depth_obligation_for_b: the v0 world's task-pool coverage run — executable only post-v0-pretrain; a DEFERRED post-checkpoint receipt, not a launch blocker (gated as an obligation, not a precondition)

wording_resolution.primary_verdict: OOD-TRANSFER-CEILING scoped to the preregistered floor
wording_resolution.scope: no detected >=13-21pp transfer effect on N=17 held-out frontier tasks at the 98-episode budget
wording_resolution.underpowered: UNDERPOWERED-AT-FLOOR is a CAVEAT, not the primary verdict; the receipt reports the MDE and the claim is budget/floor-scoped
wording_resolution.robustness: the round-3 decision rests on the floor-scoped reading and holds whether or not a sub-floor transfer effect exists, because (b)'s world is in-dist by construction and does not depend on transfer at all

binds.v0_pretrain: the round-3 training dispatch this prereg authorizes
binds.fp21b_132: retargets to the owned core's FIRST sampling round
binds.fp20c_146: retargets to the owned core's FIRST sampling round
binds.fp24_139: fires on real v0 checkpoints (same launch)

sha_convention: file shas = sha256 over the exact on-disk raw bytes, no normalization
